# Helios Consumption Pricing (Compute Credit Model)

Helios bills in compute credits — a normalized compute-hour unit. The credit
rate varies by workload tier (Jobs, Interactive, SQL) and region.

## Questions Answered
- What is the unit of consumption billing?
- Why does the same machine cost different credit rates across workload tiers?

## Questions Raised
- How predictable is monthly spend for spiky agentic workloads?
